name: Idol Fishing Camp
overview: The new JTBC program “Idol Fishing Camp” will show how idols with a diverse background of fishing experience will go about training for a worldwide fishing competition and get to know the sport.

trailers.title: [티저] K-FISHING까지 접수하러 뭉친 아이돌!＜아이돌 피싱캠프(idol fishingcamp)＞
